title: Crispy Australian Pork Belly
description: A keto-friendly dish that highlights the flavors of Australian pork belly.
instructions: Rinse the pork belly and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the pork belly with ground black pepper.
In a large pan, sear the pork belly over medium-high heat until browned on all sides.
Transfer the pork belly to a baking sheet.
Bake the pork belly in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the pork belly from the oven and top with diced bacon.
Return the pork belly to the oven and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Let the pork belly rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
